name: Bleach-RPG-Gotei 13(No longer being updated)
description:
Under Construction: What the point? Instead of creating new announcement bots I'm just gonna drop one of these to serve as an update.

1. Introduction

  • Bleach RPG, pretty self explanatory, Captains first.

2. Characters

  • Details: We've got Names, Occupation, Personality, Flaws, Appearance, Speech, Backstory, Relationships, Sex/Gender, Age, And many MANY other things. Each category has at least 2-4 traits that help flesh them out whilst I tried to stay token efficient with every character. Of course they've got their Zanpakuto's shikai bankai allat

  • Reasoning: Depending on your proxy of choice, this will dictate how your characters speak not only to you.. but to each other. So by including things like Speech, Relationships, and especially Flaws this(should) stop's LLM's from being overtly positive or agreeable. Ideally this makes it so you get some depth from the characters responses Enhanced by your prompts giving you more to chew on. This also means that YOU need to be writing enough for the bot to work off of.

3. User’s Role

  • You're not written as an academy graduate but you're also not NOT an academy graduate. You can be whatever, it is limitless afterall

4. The Bot

  • What is this? Bleach RPG/AU with various EOS elements taking place Post Hollowification incident, Pre
creator: GR0M
